sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50825" key="i(pposei/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱππο-σείρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n50825.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who leads a horse by the rein</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:75:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">75.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
